# Vendored Libraries

* `lua/` is [v5.5.0](https://github.com/lua/lua/releases/tag/v5.5.0)
* `dkjson.lua` is [v2.8](http://dkolf.de/downloads)
* `edn.lua` is [commit #dd6175bb](https://github.com/raystubbs/edn.lua/blob/dd6175bbfb357972ef0e9c5afb6871632f031d89/lua/edn.lua)
* `luaunit.lua` is [v3.4](https://github.com/bluebird75/luaunit/releases/tag/LUAUNIT_V3_4)
* `standard-clojure-style.lua` is [v0.26.0](https://github.com/oakmac/standard-clojure-style-lua/releases/tag/v0.26.0)
